name: Pana CRM - POST Media v3 (GHL Webhook)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contactId: $json.contactId, image_url: $json.mediaUrl, caption: $json.caption || '', mime_type: $json.mimeType, file_name: $json.fileName }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO historial_mensajes
  (contact_id, role, text, media_url, app_id, sender_type, is_read)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Guardar en VPS").first().json.contactId }}',
  'assistant',
  '{{ ($("Guardar en VPS").first().json.caption || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $("Guardar en VPS").first().json.mediaUrl }}',
  '6a292eaaab6c8cd2b6a8232a',
  'human',
  TRUE
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
SELECT '{{ $("Guardar en VPS").first().json.mediaUrl }}' AS media_url;
